title: wolf's HD weapons
description:
this adds HD weapons such as the sword and the axe, with a 1025 x 1025 texture
.this texture pack is for PVP club.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7812d8d3847db862f3f251dcfc001ca8caf63945.jpeg)a texture change of most of the weapon texture to make them HD

such as the netherite sword and the crossbow.              

:this texture pack changs these textures and more:           This texture pack is for PVP club

.netherite sword

.diamond sword .bow

.netherite axe

.diamond axe

.iron sword  .crossbow

.loaded crossbow                 

 .crossbow
